creator: wollman@bimajority.org
text:
I'm sure it must have some important new features that justify the
jump of two major versions, but from my perspective this looks like a
horrible regression.  I use snd (version 7) primarily for audio
recording, and snd-9's record function verges on useless.  Is there a
middle-ground revision that still has a fully functional "record"
interface but doesn't drag in all that gnome1 cruft?

-GAWollman
